use std::net::TcpStream;

struct Connection {
    stream: TcpStream,
    buffer: Vec<u8>,
}

impl Drop for Connection {
    fn drop(&mut self) {
        let _ = self.stream.write_all(b"QUIT\r\n");
        let _ = self.stream.flush();
        let mut response = vec![0u8; 1024];
        let _ = self.stream.read(&mut response);
    }
}

impl Connection {
    fn write_all(&mut self, _data: &[u8]) -> std::io::Result<()> { todo!() }
    fn flush(&mut self) -> std::io::Result<()> { todo!() }
    fn read(&mut self, _buf: &mut [u8]) -> std::io::Result<usize> { todo!() }
}
